criteria.reason: Recommendations expose LocalOS action links in API payload and UI.
CRM schedules/resources are part of the adapter contract and normalize into workplace metrics.
Import wizard blocks stale or unpreviewed imports.
Finance docs include CRM resource validation and LocalOS action notes.
Targeted tests, lint, compile and frontend build passed.

commands_run: cd frontend && npm exec -- eslint src/components/FinanceFirstStep.tsx src/components/FinanceImportPanel.tsx src/components/FinanceCrmPanel.tsx src/pages/dashboard/FinancePage.tsx
